title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: 1. **`selection_required` を実行失敗として統一する（P0）** 理由: 上流契約は「選択待ちは未完了」だが、adapter が `status=ok` で返すためオーケストレータが誤って先に進める。 対象: [orchestrator-adapter.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L1290), [orchestrator-adapter.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L1390), [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L266), テスト [test-orchestrator-adapter.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/test-orchestrator-adapter.js) 2. **契約項目を `deck-spec` スキーマで必須化する（P0）** 理由: `audience language level` / `acronym expansion plan` / `minimum readable font class` / take-home 階層が契約にあるのに validator 未検証。 対象: [orchestrator-adapter.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L477), [orchestrator-adapter.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L809), [orchestrator-adapter.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L779), テスト [test-orchestrator-adapter.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/test-orchestrator-adapter.js) 3. **下流レンダラ入口で `deck-spec/asset-plan` を必須入力にする（P1）** 理由: 契約は handoff 3点セット必須だが runtime は `workflow-decision` のみ必須で、薄い入力が通る。 対象: [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L84), [run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L709), [manus-slide-generator.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/manus-slide-generator.js#L679), [google-slides-generator.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/google-slides-generator.js#L687), テスト [test-unit-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-variant-matrix.js) 4. **QC基準を経路横断で一本化する（P1）** 理由: `gemini-only` だけ cover title wrap を非blocking化しており、品質契約が renderer 依存になっている。 対象: [qc-post-generation.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-post-generation.js#L719), [qc-post-generation.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-post-generation.js#L923), [google-slides-generator.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/google-slides-generator.js#L1060), テスト [test-unit-qc-post-generation.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-qc-post-generation.js) 5. **装飾/可読性の契約をデザイントークンで強制する（P2）** 理由: 「オレンジ装飾線デフォルト禁止」と「最小可読フォント床」が実装と逆行。トークン＋QCで統制しないと再発する。 対象: [slides-template-renderers.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/slides-template-renderers.js#L206), [generate-pptx.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/generate-pptx.js#L193), [slide-dna.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/slide-dna.js#L50), [qc-post-generation.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-post-generation.js#L46), [verify-slides.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/verify-slides.js#L231)
